channel.title: Exception-Levels on Neeraj's Tech Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Exception-Levels on Neeraj's Tech Lab

item.title: The Hunt for the Silent Kernel — Debugging a Linux Boot Hang on ARM RD-N2 FVP
item.description: A detailed debugging story of tracking down why Linux produced zero console output after 'Exiting boot services' on an ARM RD-N2 FVP — from GRUB parameters to page table walks to finding an SVE trap in EL3.
